message:
Last winter, we had a surprise snowstorm that caught nearly everyone off guard. I remember sipping my coffee, a little too smug as I watched my neighbors scramble to shovel their driveways while I cozily settled in with my family, thanks to a little prep I had done earlier. We had stocked up on snacks, blankets, and even a few board games. It turned into a fun family day instead of a panic! 

It felt good to think ahead, and honestly, it was a nice reminder that being prepared doesn't have to be stressful—it can even lead to some quality family time. 

Ever had a moment like that where your prep paid off? Share your stories!
